intro: Wednesday is Google Cloud Next day — the company unveiled the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform (rebrand of Vertex AI), the production-grade Agent2Agent protocol, 8th-gen TPUs, and a $750M partner fund. OpenAI counter-programmed with ChatGPT Workspace Agents on the same day. The enterprise AI agent war became a two-front head-to-head in real time.

top_stories.headline: Google Cloud Next 2026: Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, A2A Protocol, and $750M Partner Fund
top_stories.summary: Google rebranded Vertex AI as the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform — a unified build, scale, govern, and optimise stack for enterprise AI agents. Key launches: the production-grade Agent2Agent (A2A) cross-platform agent protocol, no-code Agent Designer, agent Inbox, and a 200+ model marketplace including Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.7. Google committed $750M to accelerate partners' agentic AI development across its 120,000-member partner ecosystem.

top_stories.headline: OpenAI Launches ChatGPT Workspace Agents on Google Cloud Next Day — Deliberate Counter-Programming
top_stories.summary: OpenAI released ChatGPT Workspace Agents on the same day as Google Cloud Next 2026, enabling enterprise users to deploy autonomous AI agents across documents, email, and third-party tools directly inside ChatGPT. The timing was deliberate — occupying the enterprise AI news cycle alongside Google's keynote. Salesforce simultaneously expanded its Google Cloud partnership to connect Agentforce with Gemini, joining both sides of the agent war.

top_stories.headline: Google Launches 8th-Generation TPUs — TPU 8t Delivers 3× Higher Compute Than Previous Generation
top_stories.summary: Google announced TPU 8t (training) and TPU 8i (inference) at Cloud Next, with TPU 8t delivering nearly 3× the compute throughput of the prior generation and 2× better performance-per-watt. The chips are optimised for the long context windows and sequential reasoning required by agentic AI workloads. Google Cloud customers get priority access before any external hardware buyer.

top_stories.headline: Google Cloud Next: 10 Workspace AI Announcements — Agent Designer, Skills, Projects, and Lyria 3 Audio
top_stories.summary: Google's Workspace track at Cloud Next landed 10 major announcements including a no-code Agent Designer, a Skills library for reusable agent capabilities, Projects for long-running agent workflows, and Lyria 3 for professional-grade AI audio generation. Direct access to Gemini 3.1 Pro for complex workflows and Gemini 3.1 Flash Image for visual assets was confirmed for all Workspace Enterprise tiers.

top_stories.headline: Google Data Agent Kit Turns VS Code and Gemini CLI Into Autonomous Data Workspaces
top_stories.summary: Google released the Cloud Data Agent Kit at Next — a portable suite of MCP tools, skills, and plugins that transforms VS Code and Gemini CLI into native data workspaces capable of orchestrating multi-step data engineering outcomes autonomously. The kit positions Google Cloud as the data infrastructure layer for enterprise AI agents, directly competing with Snowflake's Cortex and Databricks' AI/BI.

quick_hits.text: Salesforce expanded its Google Cloud partnership to connect Agentforce directly with Gemini Enterprise, enabling cross-platform agent workflows between Salesforce CRM data and Google's AI infrastructure.

Google Cloud committed to delivering five gigawatts of computing capacity to Anthropic over five years as part of the Cloud Next infrastructure announcements — separate from the investment deal announced two days later.

Google's A2A (Agent2Agent) protocol launched as open standard for cross-platform agent communication — enabling agents built on different AI platforms (Google, OpenAI, Anthropic) to communicate and coordinate tasks.

Perplexity's Computer agent product is now driving 40%+ of all new enterprise sign-ups as the company crossed $450M ARR — a new data point on how agentic products convert to enterprise revenue faster than chat products.
Microsoft Copilot for Security entered general availability across 40+ countries at Cloud Next week, integrating with Azure Sentinel and Defender for autonomous security triage and response.

tools_products.name: Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform
tools_products.what: Unified platform for building, scaling, governing, and optimising enterprise AI agents — replaces Vertex AI with a no-code Agent Designer, agent Inbox, Skills library, and 200+ model marketplace.

tools_products.name: Agent2Agent (A2A) Protocol
tools_products.what: Open production-grade standard for cross-platform AI agent communication — enables agents on different AI stacks to delegate tasks, share context, and coordinate multi-step workflows.

tools_products.name: ChatGPT Workspace Agents
tools_products.what: Enterprise AI agents embedded inside ChatGPT that autonomously handle multi-step tasks across documents, email, calendar, and connected third-party tools.

tools_products.name: Google Cloud Data Agent Kit
tools_products.what: Portable suite of MCP tools and plugins that turns VS Code and Gemini CLI into autonomous data workspaces capable of orchestrating multi-step data engineering pipelines.

tools_products.name: Lyria 3
tools_products.what: Professional-grade AI audio generation model now available inside Google Workspace — generates music, voice, and sound design assets directly in document and presentation workflows.

india_roundup.text: Google announced $15 billion in AI infrastructure investment in India at the AI Impact Summit — including data centres, sovereign cloud capacity, and developer tooling to support India's IndiaAI Mission.

India's AIGEG (AI Governance and Economic Group) — the country's first apex inter-ministerial AI governance body, constituted on April 16 — held its first coordination meeting this week across 12 ministries.

Adani Group reaffirmed its $100 billion AI data centre commitment using renewable energy in India by 2035, with an additional $150 billion earmarked for server manufacturing and sovereign cloud — the largest single industrial AI infrastructure pledge in Indian history.

14 Indian startups raised over $47 million this week across AI, gaming, education, healthcare, legaltech, and wealth-tech — with AI-led household services and enterprise CloudOps/SRE emerging as the highest-conviction funding themes.

AI skills now feature in 17% of all Indian job postings — up from 14% just weeks ago — as enterprises accelerate AI hiring in advance of the agentic wave; AI/ML roles projected to reach 4 lakh positions by end of 2026.

closing_insight: Google shipping A2A as an open standard on the same day OpenAI launches Workspace Agents is the enterprise AI equivalent of two platforms dropping competing operating systems on launch day — the winner of the agent orchestration standard wins the infrastructure margin on every enterprise AI deployment for the next decade.
